info.title: walt.id wallet
info.description:
Interact with the walt.id wallet. Version is reported to be 0.20.1 and this service instance was started 2026-06-02T06:38:11Z.
Questions about anything here? Visit support.

Any HTTP status code of 200 - 299 indicates request success, 400 - 499 client error / invalid request, 500+ internal server processing exception.

get.summary: Return user ID if logged in
Return session ID if logged in

post.summary: Register with [email + password] or [wallet address + ecosystem]
Login with [email + password] or [wallet address + ecosystem] or [oidc session]

set-cookie.description: A successful login will set a session cookie.

post.summary: Check whether an email is already registered
Request a PIN reset OTP by email

get.description: Returns a access token to be used for all further operations towards Keycloak. Required Keycloak configuration in oidc.conf.

post.description: Login of a user managed by Keycloak.
Creates a user in the configured Keycloak instance.
Terminates Keycloak and wallet session by the user identified by the Keycloak user ID.

200.description: List of wallets associated with account

requestBody.description: Key in JWK or PEM format

post.summary: Verify a signature with a specific key

parameters.name: JWK
parameters.description: The public key to verify the signature

get.summary: Show a specific key meta info

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Select format to export the key, e.g. 'JWK' / 'PEM'. JWK by default.

parameters.name: loadPrivateKey
parameters.description: Select if the secret private key should be loaded - take special care in this case! False by default.

delete.summary: Delete a specific key , will delete the key (AWS , OCI , TSE) and its reference in the wallet
Remove a specific key from the wallet

post.summary: Sign a message with a specific key

post.description: Set the default DID (which is e.g. preselected in DID selection dropdown at presentation modal)

parameters.name: did
parameters.description: DID to set as default DID

parameters.name: keyId
parameters.description: Optionally override a key ID to use (otherwise will generate a new one if not present)

parameters.name: alias
parameters.description: Optionally set key alias (otherwise will use hash of key if not present)

parameters.name: useJwkJcsPub
parameters.description: Optionally set JWK JCS Pub format (for e.g. EBSI)

parameters.name: keyId
parameters.description: Optionally override a key ID to use (otherwise will generate a new one if not present)

parameters.name: alias
parameters.description: Optionally set key alias (otherwise will use hash of key if not present)

parameters.name: keyId
parameters.description: Optionally override a key ID to use (otherwise will generate a new one if not present)

parameters.name: alias
parameters.description: Optionally set key alias (otherwise will use hash of key if not present)

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Domain to use to host did:web document at

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Path to host the did:web document at. Starting with a: "/"

parameters.name: keyId
parameters.description: Optionally override a key ID to use (otherwise will generate a new one if not present)

parameters.name: alias
parameters.description: Optionally set key alias (otherwise will use hash of key if not present)

parameters.name: keyId
parameters.description: Optionally override a key ID to use (otherwise will generate a new one if not present)

parameters.name: alias
parameters.description: Optionally set key alias (otherwise will use hash of key if not present)

parameters.name: keyId
parameters.description: Optionally override a key ID to use (otherwise will generate a new one if not present)

parameters.name: alias
parameters.description: Optionally set key alias (otherwise will use hash of key if not present)

post.description: Import a DID (did:key, did:web, did:jwk) into the wallet. Requires private key (PEM or JWK) to verify ownership.

requestBody.description: Payload containing the DID and required associated private key (JWK/PEM).

400.description: Invalid DID or missing/invalid key material

parameters.name: showDeleted
parameters.description: include the deleted credentials in the query result

parameters.name: showPending
parameters.description: include the pending credentials in the query result

post.summary: Import a signed VC JWT into the wallet

requestBody.description: Request containing the signed VC JWT and associated DID

200.description: WalletCredential in JWT (String starting with 'ey' or JSON_LD (JSON with proof) format

post.summary: Attempt to restore a soft delete credential

200.description: WalletCredential in JWT (String starting with 'ey' or JSON_LD (JSON with proof) format

400.description: Credential status could not be established or an error occured
WalletCredential category could not be added
WalletCredential category could not be deleted

parameters.name: did
parameters.description: The DID to issue the credential(s) to

parameters.name: requireUserInput
parameters.description: Whether to claim as pending acceptance

parameters.name: pinOrTxCode
parameters.description: The `pin` (Draft11), or `tx_code` (Draft13 and onwards), value that may be required as part of a pre-authorized code (credential issuance) flow

post.summary: Returns the credentials stored in the wallet that match the passed presentation definition

requestBody.description: Presentation definition to match credentials against

200.description: Credentials that match the presentation definition

post.summary: Returns the credentials that are required by the presentation definition but not found in the wallet

200.description: Filters that failed to fulfill the presentation definition

post.summary: Present credential(s) to a Relying Party

get.summary: Receive an verifiable credential type (VCT) URL and return resolved vct object as described in IETF SD-JWT VC

parameters.name: vct
parameters.description: The value of the vct in URL format

400.description: Failed to add issuer to wallet

put.summary: Authorize issuer to automatically add credentials to the wallet in future

get.summary: Show supported credentials for the given issuer
Retrieve event logs for currently signed in account wallet

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: List of key=value pairs for filtering

400.description: Event log could not be deleted

get.summary: Get credential manifest, if available, otherwise null
Get offer display info, if available, otherwise empty object
Get offer issuer info, if available, otherwise empty object
Extract manifest info from issuance request offer, if available, otherwise empty object

200.description: The manifest issuer info json object

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The max number of items to return

200.description: The list of the most frequently used credentials

post.summary: Parse MDOC document to JSON element

auth-bearer-alternative.description: Set alternative header "waltid-authorization: Bearer %token-here%" to authenticate.
